title: SUNCLAY Modelling Clay Air Drying - 55 Colours Clay Set with 80 Pages Instructions Book 9 Pieces Kneading Tool 5 Pieces Dough Accessories Toy Gifts for Children Boys Girls from 3 4 5 6 7 8-12 Years
features: 🌈🌈【2025 Newest Air Dry Clay】SUNCLAY arts and crafts is newly upgraded, which includes 50+5 bright colours modelling clay, an 80 pages tutorial book, 9 tools, and 5 accessory sets. Clay modelling kit is super soft, light, not sticky, and will bring lots of surprises and fun for kids.(NOTE: these 5 colors come with two white and one red, one yellow and one blue)

🌈🌈【80 Pages Tutorial Book】Modelling clay comes with an 80 pages tutorial book, which covers 99 different shapes in 6 categories including food, animals, living goods, vehicles, cartoon characters and plants. Difficulty levels are progressive and perfect for beginners.

🌈🌈【Safety First】Air dry clay is 100% safe, 100% non-toxic, and 100% hypoallergenic, which is free of wheat, gluten, and casein. With ASTM, EN71, CPSIA certified and approved for USA and EU Standards. Very safe and friendly for kids.

🌈🌈【Perfect Gift for Kids】Are you still worried about gifts for your kids? SUNCLAY arts and crafts clay is a great choice, which is designed for children to promote sensory development and logical thinking skills, stimulate creativity and develop self-confidence. The MVP of toy gifts for boys and girls.

🌈🌈【100% Satisfaction Guarantee】SUNCLAY is committed to providing each customer with the highest standard of customer service. If you have any questions about air clay, please open the product page - click Store - ask a question. We will solve any questions about air drying clay.
